sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Titan International Q4 2025 earnings preview
feed.summary: The article "Titan International Q4 2025 earnings preview" indicates that Titan International will soon release its fourth-quarter 2025 earnings report. However, no specific details or forecasts regarding the earnings are provided within the current content.

feed.title: Texas Roadhouse (TXRH) director Carroll sells shares, holds future RSU awards
feed.summary: Texas Roadhouse director Hugh J. Carroll sold 988 shares of common stock at $170.96 per share, reducing his direct ownership to 866 common shares. Despite the sale, Carroll retains significant future equity exposure through Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) that are set to vest on July 2, 2026 (2,667 units) and January 8, 2027 (1,200 units), subject to his continued service with the company. This transaction was reported in an SEC Form 4 filing, indicating moderate impact and negative sentiment due to the sale.

feed.title: Titan America (TTAM) Margin Improvement To 11.1% Tests Skeptical Project Risk Narratives
feed.summary: Titan America (TTAM) reported a strong FY 2025 with revenue of US$1.7 billion and EPS of US$1.01, achieving an 11.1% net margin and 11.7% earnings growth. This performance, especially the improved margins, challenges skeptical views regarding project risks and capital intensity in the industry. The company currently trades at a P/E of 15.6x, significantly below its DCF fair value of US$31.15, suggesting it may be undervalued despite revenue growth forecasts being below the broader US market.

feed.title: Compared to estimates, Ternium (TX) Q4 earnings: A look at key metrics
feed.summary: This article analyzes Ternium's (TX) Q4 earnings report, highlighting key financial metrics and comparing them to analyst estimates. It delves into the company's performance during the quarter and provides insight into its financial health.

feed.title: Wells Fargo retains an underweight rating on Ternium SA (TX)

feed.title: TRNR Provides Shareholder Update on Sportstech Process & Operating Strategy
feed.summary: Interactive Strength Inc. (TRNR) has issued a shareholder letter to update investors on the Sportstech loan and acquisition process and to provide further details on its improved operating scale and immediate future plans. The company, known for its Wattbike, CLMBR, and FORME fitness brands, advises shareholders to visit its website for email updates regarding new information. This update also highlights the potential risks and uncertainties associated with the Sportstech acquisition and other corporate actions.

feed.title: Wilmington Savings Fund Society FSB Sells 3,841 Shares of The Sherwin-Williams Company $SHW
feed.summary: Wilmington Savings Fund Society FSB reduced its stake in The Sherwin-Williams Company by 23.1% in the third quarter, selling 3,841 shares and retaining 12,754 shares valued at $4.416 million. Sherwin-Williams reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and increased its quarterly dividend to $0.80. The company currently holds a consensus analyst rating of "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $388.21.

feed.title: Wilmington Savings Fund Society FSB Sells 19,465 Shares of Phillips 66 $PSX
feed.summary: Wilmington Savings Fund Society FSB significantly reduced its stake in Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) by 52.7%, selling 19,465 shares, though major institutions like Vanguard and Norges Bank increased their holdings. The oil and gas company recently raised its quarterly dividend to $1.27, yet notable insider selling by executives like Brian Mandell could impact investor sentiment. Analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for Phillips 66 with an average price target of $162.33.

feed.title: Wilmington Savings Fund Society FSB Sells 2,150 Shares of Parker-Hannifin Corporation $PH
feed.summary: Wilmington Savings Fund Society FSB significantly reduced its stake in Parker-Hannifin Corporation by selling 2,150 shares, now holding 4,619 shares valued at $3.50 million. The article also highlights recent insider selling by the CFO and VP, totaling approximately $9.89 million, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for the stock with a consensus price target of $995.37. Parker-Hannifin recently reported strong earnings per share of $7.65, exceeding analysts' estimates.

feed.title: Wilmington Savings Fund Society FSB Lowers Stock Holdings in Altria Group, Inc. $MO
feed.summary: Wilmington Savings Fund Society FSB significantly reduced its stake in Altria Group, Inc. by 25.6% in the third quarter of 2025, selling 22,035 shares and retaining 64,159 shares valued at $4.24 million. Altria recently declared a quarterly dividend of $1.06 per share, annualized to $4.24, representing a 6.5% yield and a payout ratio of 103.16%. The company's Q3 earnings per share of $1.30 missed analyst estimates by $0.02, with revenue down 0.5% year-over-year, and the stock currently trades near $65 with a consensus "Hold" rating.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive Company $CL Shares Sold by Wilmington Savings Fund Society FSB
feed.summary: Wilmington Savings Fund Society FSB significantly reduced its stake in Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) by 28.9% in the third quarter, selling 13,983 shares. This institutional selling coincides with recent insider selling totaling $17.49 million over the last 90 days, including a substantial sale by CFO Stanley Sutula III. Despite these sales, Colgate-Palmolive reported solid Q3 earnings, beating analyst estimates, and increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Sunbelt Securities Inc. Sells 66,388 Shares of AT&T Inc. $T
feed.summary: Sunbelt Securities Inc. reduced its stake in AT&T Inc. by 52.9% in the third quarter, selling 66,388 shares and bringing its total holdings to 59,213 shares valued at $1,672,000. Despite this sale, several other institutional investors either initiated new positions or increased their holdings in AT&T during recent quarters. Analyst ratings on AT&T are predominantly positive, with an average "Moderate Buy" rating and a consensus target price of $30.35, indicating a generally favorable outlook from the investment community.

feed.title: Wilmington Savings Fund Society FSB Has $5.73 Million Holdings in Philip Morris International Inc. $PM
feed.summary: Wilmington Savings Fund Society FSB reduced its stake in Philip Morris International by 40.9% in Q3, now holding 35,346 shares worth $5.73 million. Philip Morris CEO Jacek Olczak and CFO Emmanuel Babeau also sold significant shares in February, totaling about 113,800 shares. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $196.83, and the company offers a quarterly dividend of $1.47 per share.

feed.title: Wilmington Savings Fund Society FSB Sells 5,427 Shares of The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc $PNC
feed.summary: Wilmington Savings Fund Society FSB significantly reduced its holdings in The PNC Financial Services Group, selling 5,427 shares, decreasing its stake by 18.9%. This comes amidst notable insider selling by executives, including CEO William Demchak. Despite this, PNC Financial Services Group has reported strong fundamentals, beating quarterly earnings estimates and maintaining a "Moderate Buy" consensus analyst rating.

feed.title: Wilmington Savings Fund Society FSB Has $5.24 Million Holdings in Bristol Myers Squibb Company $BMY
feed.summary: Wilmington Savings Fund Society FSB reduced its stake in Bristol Myers Squibb Company by 20.8% in Q3, now holding 116,259 shares valued at $5.24 million. Bristol Myers Squibb recently reported QEPS of $1.26, missing estimates, but revenue slightly beat consensus, and the company declared a quarterly dividend of $0.63. Analysts currently have a consensus "Hold" rating on the stock with an average price target of $61.41.

feed.title: Wilmington Savings Fund Society FSB Sells 75,143 Shares of Pfizer Inc. $PFE
feed.summary: Wilmington Savings Fund Society FSB reduced its stake in Pfizer Inc. by 25.8% in Q3, selling 75,143 shares and retaining a holding valued at $5.497 million. Despite this, other institutions like Norges Bank and Franklin Resources significantly increased their positions, with institutional ownership now at 68.36%. Pfizer recently surpassed Q4 earnings and revenue expectations and received an upgrade from HSBC, indicating mixed but generally positive market sentiment.

feed.title: Williams Companies, Inc. (The) $WMB Shares Bought by Sunbelt Securities Inc.
feed.summary: Sunbelt Securities Inc. significantly increased its stake in Williams Companies, Inc. (NYSE:WMB) by 2,906.4% in the third quarter, now owning 20,654 shares valued at $1,308,000. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions, with analysts setting new price targets and maintaining "Moderate Buy" ratings for the stock. The company recently announced a quarterly dividend increase to $0.525 per share and reported insider selling activity.

feed.title: Arch Insurance International launches new IP consortium at Lloyd’s
feed.summary: Arch Insurance International has launched a new Intellectual Property (IP) Consortium at Lloyd's, designed to offer $40 million in line size to meet the rising demand for IP insurance solutions. The consortium, supported by several Lloyd's syndicates, will be led by Arch and will cover Infringement Liability, IP Rights Protection, and IP Rights Enforcement for various businesses. It aims to provide efficient and simplified placement and claims handling processes.

feed.title: Egypt Strengthens Pharma Innovation Push Through Expanded Takeda Partnership
feed.summary: Egypt is enhancing its pharmaceutical research and innovation capabilities through an expanded partnership with Takeda Pharmaceutical Company. High-level discussions between the Egyptian Drug Authority (EDA) and Takeda focused on deepening scientific cooperation, improving access to advanced treatments, and strengthening intellectual property protections. This collaboration aims to position Egypt as a regional hub for pharmaceutical innovation and attract further investment in the sector.

feed.title: Tractor Supply Co Stock (ISIN: US89151E1091) Hits 52-Week Low Amid Earnings Miss and Insider Selling
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Co (TSCO) stock has fallen to a new 52-week low of approximately $46 after missing quarterly earnings expectations and seeing significant insider selling. Despite a dividend increase, weakening rural consumer spending and increased promotional activity are impacting the company's performance, leading analysts to lower price targets while maintaining a "Moderate Buy" consensus. The decline highlights vulnerabilities for this rural lifestyle retailer, particularly for European investors tracking U.S. consumer staples.

feed.title: A lupus skin disease with no targeted treatment gets new Biogen data
feed.summary: Biogen (Nasdaq: BIIB) will present late-breaking Phase 2 AMETHYST Part A data for litifilimab in cutaneous lupus erythematosus (CLE) at the 2026 American Academy of Dermatology Annual Meeting. Litifilimab, a BDCA2-targeting monoclonal antibody, recently received FDA Breakthrough Therapy Designation for CLE. The Phase 3 study for litifilimab is on track, with a data readout anticipated in 2027.

feed.title: Fresh $500M gives TG Therapeutics room to triple stock buybacks
feed.summary: TG Therapeutics secured a new five-year $750 million senior secured credit facility with Blue Owl, raising $500 million in net non-dilutive capital after repaying a previous facility. Concurrently, the company expanded its share repurchase program from $100 million to $300 million, signaling confidence in its financial position and commitment to shareholder value. This move aims to provide financial flexibility for strategic initiatives and further investment in their commercial product BRIUMVI and pipeline.

feed.title: TG Therapeutics Secures an Additional $500 Million in
feed.summary: TG Therapeutics has secured an additional $500 million in non-dilutive capital through an expanded $750 million senior secured credit facility with Blue Owl. This new funding will allow the company to repay its previous $250 million facility, expand its share repurchase program from $100 million to $300 million, and support strategic initiatives and business development for its multiple sclerosis drug, BRIUMVI. The company believes this move enhances its financial flexibility and commitment to shareholder value.

feed.title: GAMMA Investing LLC Raises Stock Position in Amgen Inc. $AMGN
feed.summary: GAMMA Investing LLC increased its stake in Amgen Inc. by 22.1% in the fourth quarter of an unspecified year, now holding 16,039 shares valued at $5.25 million. Amgen recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating expectations, and provided optimistic guidance for FY 2026, alongside declaring a quarterly dividend. However, the stock experienced a slight downturn due to mixed headlines including enthusiasm for an obesity drug candidate and concerns about potential discounts on another product.

feed.title: Apple Inc. $AAPL is Sunbelt Securities Inc.'s 4th Largest Position
feed.summary: Sunbelt Securities Inc. significantly increased its stake in Apple Inc. ($AAPL) during the third quarter, making it their 4th largest position. Apple recently exceeded earnings expectations with strong revenue growth and announced a quarterly dividend. The company is experiencing positive momentum from strong sales in China and potential AI-related revenue, though some concerns about product cycles and talent retention exist.

feed.title: Jacobs & Co. CA Trims Stock Position in Electronic Arts Inc. $EA
feed.summary: Jacobs & Co. CA significantly reduced its stake in Electronic Arts Inc. by 84.8% in Q4, selling over 46,000 shares. This comes amidst ongoing speculation about a potential $55 billion take-private deal for EA, with JPMorgan marketing a large term-loan and banks preparing to place substantial debt. Additionally, several EA insiders, including CEO Andrew Wilson and EVP Laura Miele, sold shares, contributing to a total of 27,600 insider shares sold in the last 90 days.

feed.title: Darden Sales Rise, Boosted by LongHorn Steakhouse
feed.summary: Darden Restaurants reported a 5.9% increase in third-quarter sales, reaching $3.35 billion, primarily driven by the strong performance of its LongHorn Steakhouse brand. Despite the rise in sales, the company's net income for the quarter decreased to $306.8 million, or $2.65 a share, compared to the previous year.

feed.title: Synopsys, Inc. $SNPS Shares Acquired by Jacobs & Co. CA
feed.summary: Jacobs & Co. CA increased its stake in Synopsys, Inc. (NASDAQ:SNPS) by 11.6% in the fourth quarter, bringing their total holdings to 27,411 shares valued at $12.875 million. This makes Synopsys the 27th largest position in their portfolio. Other institutional investors also significantly increased their positions, while company insiders sold shares totaling approximately $1.95 million.

feed.title: Rental Demand Softened in Late 2025 as Applications Dropped 10%, New TransUnion Analysis Shows
feed.summary: A new TransUnion analysis reveals that property managers experienced a 10% year-over-year drop in tenant applications in the second half of 2025, with the steepest declines in western and southwestern states. This softening demand, attributed to increased apartment construction and economic uncertainty, led property managers to lower credit thresholds to maintain occupancy, potentially increasing tenant risk. TransUnion suggests using rental-specific scoring models and re-evaluating traditional income-to-rent ratios to mitigate these risks and identify strong tenants.

feed.title: Jacobs & Co. CA Sells 69,979 Shares of Kenvue Inc. $KVUE
feed.summary: Jacobs & Co. CA significantly reduced its stake in Kenvue Inc. (NYSE: KVUE) by 27.6% in the fourth quarter, selling 69,979 shares to hold 183,638 shares valued at approximately $3.17 million. Kenvue's stock opened at $17.52 and has a market capitalization of $33.58 billion, with a P/E ratio of 22.75. The company recently exceeded Q4 earnings expectations with EPS of $0.27 and revenue of $3.78 billion and has an average analyst rating of "Hold" with a $19.58 price target.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Financial Companies: Arthur J Gallagher & Co (AJG) and Mastercard (MA)
feed.summary: This article highlights bullish sentiments from financial analysts regarding Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (AJG) and Mastercard (MA). Wells Fargo maintained a Buy rating for both companies, with price targets of $298.00 for AJG and $668.00 for MA. Other firms like RBC Capital and Bank of America Securities also initiated coverage with Buy ratings, indicating a positive outlook for these financial sector stocks.

feed.title: Why TMC the metals (TMC) Is Down 10.1% After NOAA Clears Novel Deep-Sea Mining Permit Application
feed.summary: TMC the metals company Inc.'s subsidiary, TMC USA, recently received a positive finding from NOAA regarding its application for a deep-sea polymetallic nodule exploration license and commercial recovery permit, indicating substantial compliance with relevant regulations. Despite this, TMC's stock is down 10.1%, as investors remain concerned about permitting timelines, funding, and technical execution, even with a recent $85.17 million investment from Korea Zinc. The company's future hinges on its ability to translate regulatory progress into commercial production and manage its significant cash burn.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Consumer Goods Companies: Coca-Cola (KO) and Freshpet (FRPT)
feed.summary: RBC Capital analyst James Edwardes Jones maintained a Buy rating on Coca-Cola (KO) with an $87.00 price target, aligning with a Strong Buy consensus among analysts. Stifel Nicolaus analyst Matthew Smith, CFA, also maintained a Buy rating on Freshpet (FRPT) with an $84.00 price target, contributing to a Strong Buy consensus for Freshpet. Both companies are viewed favorably by analysts in the Consumer Goods sector, with projected upsides from current levels.

feed.title: GFA, Hilton Announce Waldorf Astoria Residences Guadalajara, First Standalone Branded Residences in Mexico and the Caribbean and Latin America
feed.summary: GFA and Hilton have announced the signing of Waldorf Astoria Residences Guadalajara, set to deliver in Winter 2029. This project marks the debut of the first standalone Waldorf Astoria branded residence in Mexico, the Caribbean, and Latin America. The 30-story tower will feature 114 private residences with world-class amenities, expanding Hilton's presence in the branded residential sector.

feed.title: TVA to meet with Gregory family amid power line proposal through 239yr old farm
feed.summary: The Tennessee Valley Authority (TVA) is scheduled to meet with the Gregory Family and their supporters to discuss a controversial power line proposal that would run through their 239-year-old farm in Sumner County. Eighth-generation farmer John Gregory is advocating for an alternative route for the power line, which the TVA attributes to growth in Gallatin. Country singer John Rich will also be present at the meeting, supporting the Gregory family.

feed.title: Is Weyerhaeuser (WY) Starting To Look Interesting After Its Recent Share Price Weakness?
feed.summary: Weyerhaeuser (WY) has experienced recent share price weakness, with a 12.4% decline over 30 days and an 18.9% decline over one year. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is significantly undervalued by 81.5% at its current price of US$23.43, implying an intrinsic value of $126.54 per share. However, its P/E ratio of 52.11x is above industry and peer averages, and Simply Wall St's proprietary Fair Ratio indicates it may be overvalued on this metric.

feed.title: NetApp’s New NVIDIA-Powered AI Data Engine Could Be A Game Changer For NetApp (NTAP)
feed.summary: NetApp has launched new EF-Series storage systems and an AI Data Engine (AIDE), co-engineered with NVIDIA, aimed at supporting intensive AI and HPC workloads. This collaboration with NVIDIA integrates NetApp's core storage into NVIDIA's AI Data Platform, positioning NetApp as a key infrastructure provider for enterprises scaling AI. This move is crucial for NetApp's investment narrative, as it addresses the growing demand for AI-led infrastructure and seeks to offset the structural risks associated with the decline of traditional on-premises storage.

feed.title: Form DEFA14A AFLAC INC
feed.summary: Aflac Incorporated has filed a Definitive Additional Materials proxy statement (Form DEFA14A) with the SEC regarding its upcoming Annual Meeting to be held on May 4, 2026. Shareholders are urged to vote on the election of eleven directors, a non-binding advisory proposal on executive compensation, and the ratification of KPMG LLP as the independent auditor. The board recommends against a shareholder proposal for an independent board chairman.

feed.title: Darden Restaurants reports Q3 fiscal 2026: Sales $3.35B, adjusted EPS $2.95, dividend $1.50
feed.summary: Darden Restaurants announced its Q3 fiscal 2026 results, reporting total sales of $3.35 billion and adjusted diluted EPS of $2.95, a 5.4% increase year-over-year. The company declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.50 per share and repurchased $127 million of common stock. Key business highlights include a 4.2% increase in same-restaurant sales and an updated full-year outlook anticipating approximately 9.5% total sales growth.

feed.title: Aflac (NYSE: AFL) 2026 proxy details pay, board and chair proposal vote
feed.summary: Aflac's 2026 proxy statement outlines key votes for its upcoming annual meeting, including the election of eleven directors, an advisory vote on executive compensation, director renomination, auditor ratification, and a shareholder proposal for an independent board chair, which the board recommends against. The company highlights its strong 2025 financial performance, including $3.6 billion in net earnings and a 16% dividend increase. Furthermore, the proxy details Aflac's pay-for-performance compensation philosophy, strong corporate governance practices, and stakeholder engagement efforts, emphasizing the link between executive pay and shareholder value creation.

feed.title: NY, other states sue to block $6B merger involving Syracuse TV station’s owner
feed.summary: New York Attorney General Letitia James, along with seven other states, has filed a lawsuit to block the proposed $6 billion merger between Nexstar Media Group and Tegna, Inc. The merger would create the largest broadcast station group in the U.S., potentially leading to higher costs for consumers and reduced quality of local news. Despite opposition, the deal has received support from former President Donald Trump, who believes it would increase competition against national news networks.

feed.title: Talos Energy earns relative strength rating upgrade; hits key threshold
feed.summary: Talos Energy (NYSE:TALO) saw its Relative Strength (RS) Rating upgraded to 71, reaching a key threshold. The improved rating indicates that Talos Energy's stock has outperformed 71% of all other stocks in terms of price performance over the past year. This upgrade highlights positive momentum for the company in the market.

feed.title: Brand House Collective (TBHC) price target increased by 25.00% to 1.28
feed.summary: This article reports a significant increase in the price target for Brand House Collective (TBHC), which has risen by 25.00% to $1.28.

feed.title: Stratasys (SSYS) director Yair Seroussi reports initial insider holdings on Form 3
feed.summary: Stratasys (SSYS) Director Yair Seroussi has filed an initial Form 3, disclosing his beneficial ownership of the company's securities. The filing details direct holdings of ordinary shares and various stock option grants with exercise prices ranging from $6.18 to $25.03 and expiration dates between 2027 and 2035. It clarifies that a portion of the ordinary shares represents restricted share units vesting in monthly installments from July 2025 to July 2026, with a similar vesting schedule for a related stock option grant.

feed.title: Daniel Feffer details large Suzano S.A. (SUZ) stake via Suzano Holding
feed.summary: Suzano S.A. director Daniel Feffer has filed an initial ownership report (Form 3) detailing his significant stake in the company. The filing indicates his indirect ownership of 367,612,329 common shares through Suzano Holding S.A., over which he has shared voting and dispositive power, plus an additional 48,077,305 common shares held directly. This report establishes his existing positions and control structure rather than reflecting new buying or selling activity.

feed.title: UK regulator probes Photoshop maker Adobe over cancellation fee concerns
feed.summary: Britain's competition regulator has launched an investigation into Adobe concerning its early cancellation fees, examining whether they are unfair and misleading to customers. This probe follows a $150 million settlement in the U.S. where Adobe was accused of concealing termination fees and making cancellations difficult. The watchdog has not yet reached conclusions on whether Adobe has broken the law but is using new enforcement powers to investigate.
